title: tomophyllum macrum
intro: Tomophyllum macrum, also known as the Macrum fern or Macrum species, is a type of tropical epiphytic fern native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of antioxidants and flavonoids in its leaves. The health benefits of Tomophyllum macrum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Tomophyllum macrum is typically harvested for its leaves, which can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use.
